name: Worley Limited
analysis: WOR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$12.8200, stop A$12.2265, target A$14.6005 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
